'''DNX-N1''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] located within the [[Wild Space/Legends|Wild Space]]<ref name="CSWE" /> [[DNX-N1 system/Legends|DNX-N1 system]].<ref name="TEA" /> [[Star map/Legends|Charted]] but<ref name="Alien Encounters">''[[Alien Encounters]]''</ref> largely [[Scout/Legends|unexplored]], it was the [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]] of<ref name="CSWE" /> the [[Sentience/Legends|sentient]] [[Gas/Legends|gaseous]] [[Species/Legends|species]] known as the [[Filar-Nitzan/Legends|Filar-Nitzan]].<ref name="Alien Encounters" />

==Behind the scenes==
DNX-N1 was first indirectly mentioned in ''[[Alliance Intelligence Reports]]'', a [[1995]] sourcebook for [[West End Games]]' ''[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]]''.<ref name="Alliance Intelligence Reports">''[[Alliance Intelligence Reports]]''</ref> The planet was first given its name by the [[1998]] sourcebook ''[[Alien Encounters]]''.<ref name="Alien Encounters" /> The [[2009]] reference book ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' placed the DNX-N1 [[Star system/Legends|system]], and therefore the planet DNX-N1, within grid square N-21.<ref name="TEA" />
